ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee receiving the earning */,
  "earning_type" TEXT /* Type of earning (e.g., Basic Salary, House Rent Allowance) */,
  "current_amount" REAL /* Current amount for the earning */,
  "arrears_amount" REAL /* Total arrears amount for the earning */,
  "earning_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the earning */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the earning */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the earning (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deductions" (
  "deduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deduction record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee from whose earnings the deduction is made */,
  "deduction_type" TEXT /* Type of deduction (e.g., Provident Fund, ESIS Deduction) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the deduction */,
  "deduction_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the deduction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the deduction */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the deduction (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deductions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee for whom the payroll is calculated */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay after deductions for the payroll period */,
  "pay_period" TEXT /* Period for which the payroll is applicable */,
  "payroll_status" TEXT /* Status of the payroll */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date on which the payroll was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee associated with this history */,
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payroll record */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the payroll record was updated */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for updating the payroll history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_history_payroll_id FOREIGN KEY ("payroll_id") REFERENCES payroll ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee to whom the tax applies */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., Income Tax) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the tax */,
  "tax_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the tax */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the tax */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tax (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health Insurance) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the benefit */,
  "benefit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee for whom the summary is calculated */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the employee */,
  "total_deductions" REAL /* Total deductions from the employee */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay after all deductions */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date on which the summary was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_summary_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
